hero.subtitle: Plumber, electrician, carpenter, cleaning and more — post your request, get offers from nearby pros, and choose with confidence.

services.title: Everything your home needs, in one place
services.subtitle: Dozens of trusted trades, ready whenever you are.

how.title: Three simple steps
how.subtitle: From request to done — a fully seamless experience.
how.step1_desc: Describe what you need by text, voice or photo, set your location and time.
how.step2_desc: Nearby pros send you their price, ETA and you can see their ratings.
how.step3_desc: Choose the best offer, track your pro, and rate the service afterwards.

workers.benefit2: You set your prices and hours
workers.benefit3: Clear payments and reviews that build your reputation

features.title: Built for your peace of mind
features.f1_desc: Verified profiles and real reviews from previous clients.
features.f2_desc: Understands your request and routes it to the right pro in seconds.
features.f3_desc: We connect you to the nearest pros based on your location.
features.f5_desc: Compare offers and choose with no surprises.
features.f6_desc: Full interface in Arabic, French and English.

faq.title: Got a question? We've got answers
faq.a1: Yes, downloading and posting a request are completely free. You only pay the pro for the service.
faq.a2: Every pro has a profile with client reviews and completed jobs you can check before choosing.
faq.a3: We're expanding across Algeria's wilayas. Download the app to check availability in your area.
faq.q4: How do I join as a pro?
faq.a4: Download the app, pick 'Pro' at sign-up, complete your profile and trade to start receiving jobs.

sections.p: We collect your phone number, name, location (on request) and the details of your service requests (text, photos, audio) to operate the platform and match you with nearby professionals.
Your data is used solely to provide the service: sharing your request with professionals, sending notifications and improving your experience. We never sell your data to third parties.
Sensitive data is stored encrypted and access is limited to what the service requires. You can request deletion of your account and data at any time.
For any privacy question, write to contact@khidmeti.com.
Khidmeti is a marketplace connecting clients with independent professionals. Professionals are responsible for the quality and pricing of their work; agreements are made directly between the parties.
You are responsible for the accuracy of your account information and the confidentiality of your credentials. Fraudulent or abusive accounts may be suspended.
The app is free for clients. The service is paid directly to the professional. Reviews must reflect a genuine experience.
We verify professional profiles where possible, without assuming direct liability for work performed outside the platform.
